candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing line, not the preferred reported subtotal.
Non-current, not current assets.
Non-current subtotal, not current assets.

candidates.row_label: Net gain/loss on divestment of non-current assets
candidates.why: Cash flow item, unrelated to current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the reported balance-sheet subtotal for total current assets.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash line; exact semantic match.
Too narrow versus cash and cash equivalents.
Also a direct balance-sheet cash line; same concept with different capitalization.

candidates.why: Cash flow adjustment, not ending cash balance on balance sheet.
Cash flow adjustment, not cash balance.
Cash flow adjustment, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow disclosure, not balance-sheet target.

candidates.why: Cash flow disclosure, not balance-sheet target.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Could reconcile to CHE, but target should come from balance sheet when available.
Not cash and equivalents.

variables.notes: Both balance-sheet labels are direct matches and appear to be capitalization variants used across periods; priority given to lowercase variant first.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line and non-current, not current liabilities.
Non-current liabilities, not current liabilities.

variables.notes: Selected the reported balance-sheet subtotal for total current liabilities.

candidates.why: Direct match conceptually for current debt, but preview values are blank and may not be the active reported line.

variables.notes: R:nc. Works is we prioritize the top row that is populated. Chose 'Other credit institutions' because it appears in the current-liabilities section and best matches short-term borrowings; excluded lease rows per rule. Manual review needed because the same exact row label also appears in the non-current liabilities section, creating ambiguity in row-label-only mapping.

candidates.why: Best match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities when appearing in the current-liabilities section.
Likely current tax asset/receivable in current assets section, not taxes payable.
Explicitly a receivable, not payable.

variables.notes: R:nc. Selected 'Income tax' as the current tax liability/payable line. Manual review needed because the exact label 'Income tax' also appears again in the non-current liabilities section, so row-label-only mapping is ambiguous.

candidates.why: Direct match for total/net PPE on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Prepayments and property, plant and equipment under construction
candidates.why: Component of PPE, not preferred when total PPE exists.
Gross tangible assets, less preferred than reported PPE total/net line.

candidates.row_label: Investments in property, plant and equipment under construction
candidates.why: Cash flow capex item, not balance-sheet PPE stock.
Cash flow disposal item, not PPE balance.

variables.notes: Used the direct reported PPE balance-sheet line; preferred over construction/prepayment component lines.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.
Balance-sheet total on the liabilities/equity side; not preferred when 'Assets' exists.
Balancing line, not preferred.

variables.notes: Selected the direct total assets line.

Earnings measure, not cash flow.

variables.notes: Direct operating cash flow line from the cash flow statement.
